titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 180: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 180. (A.R. No. 366 of 1917.) TIRUVĀṆḌĀRKŌYIL, PONDICHERRY STATE.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Pañchanadēśvara temple.

It is damaged in places and is also incomplete. It was first published in S.I.I. Vol. XIX. Later on a revised version of the text is given in Pondicherry inscriptions. It seems to record the grant of share lands after purchasing the same from several brāhmaṇas, and excluding the house site, to god Paramasvāmigaḷ of Tiruvāṟai-Nakkaṉ temple at Tribhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Ōramman alias Ādittan Saṅkaran ••• ••• of Śrī Nārāyaṇachchēri-Āramur in Tribhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅglam, a brahmadēyam on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri). The said land was entrusted to Piḷḷai Sadāśivaṉ Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Iḍaiyyāṟṟukkuḍi-Kiḷimāḍam on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti in the fourteenth regnal year (of Uttama chōḷa).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 373. Also see Pondicherry Inscription No. 47 Ed., Bahour S. Kuppusamy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī ..kopparakecaripanmarkki yāṇṭu 10 5 Āva
tu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrītribhuvanamahādevi catu
[rvvedimaṅkalam] yāḷuṅkaṇattāruḷ śrīnārāyaṇacceri
Āramur Orammannāṉa Ātittaṉ caṅkaran
ku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu Uttarāyanam paṟṟina saṅkraānti nāḷ (ā)
muḻaiyur nāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruṉaḷāṟu parameśvara pa
ṭṭārakar koyilile vaytu Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭi kiḷimāṭat
tupiḷḷai satāśivaṉ nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ kaiyile tri(ri)
bhuvannamahādeviścaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvāṟai
nakkaṉ koyil paramasvāmikaḷukku manai ṉiṅkalāka
Ivūr Oru paṅkum niroṭu Aṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Ikkuṭutta
paṅkāvatu Ivūr Iruṣigecavacceri Iṭaiyāṟṟukku
ṭi virasvāmiccomāciyār Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakattu Ivvirasvā
micomāciyār śāsānabaddar Āka paṭaittuṭaiya paṅko
ṉṟum Ivare
y Ivvaṣṭakattu śāsanabaddhan marutūr pālāciriyaṉ nakkaṉātittaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya paṅkoṉṟum I
varaiy Ivvaṣṭakattu śāsanabaddhanuṅ koṭṭaiyūr cāvān=ti kotai koṟṟa nampi pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya paṅ
koṉṟu(m)māka Imuṉṟu paṅkilum Ivaruṭaiya pautran paśupati tāmotirabhaṭṭaṉum I
van tampiyum Ivar pakkal kūṟu peṟṟuṭaiya mukkāl paṅkum Ivaṉ tampi veḷātekaḻicu paśupa
ti tāmotirabhaṭṭaṉ niteyāna mukkāl paṅkum Ivirasvāmi comāciyār bhākhattil Ivar makan viraṉṉātittaṉo
ṭu Ippacupati tāmotira bhaṭṭaṉ kūṟu peṟṟuṭaiya ya kuḷakkāl paṅkumāka Oru paṅkum kāṇi vilainūkku viṣṇuvatikku kiḻakku vira
ce Ippa ti tāmotira bhaṭṭaṉ pakkal nāṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya paṅku Oṉṟuṉukkum viṣṇuva
tikku kiḻakku viracoḻavākkālukku vaṭakku
meṟkku niṉṟa Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkku nin
ṟum Iraṇṭāñ caturattu meṟ kaṭañca Aṟu
māvil vaṭak kaṭañca munṟu māvil kiḻa
kkaṭañca Oru mā varaiyil Ippaṅkin
vacam vanta meṟkaṭaiñca mukkāṇi
niṅkalāka Itukkut tulaimāṟu
Ivvāṟu māviley marutūr pālāciriyaṉ Aṣṭa ṇi kumaraṉ paṅkiṉ vacam mukkāṇi teṟkaṭainta Orumā varaiyil kiḻaka
ṭainta mukkāṇi taṉ makaṉ kumaran cāttikku śrīdhanamākak kuṭuttu Āvaḷ tan bhattāRead bharttāIṭaiyāṟṟu taccar vānatikke kāṭa
van ṉilakaṇṭantai mutukaṇṇā(k)ka Eṉakku viṟṟa mukkāṇi Akappaṭa Ivoru paṅkum maṉai niṅkiṭallāka tiruvā
ṟai nakkaṉ vātecaRead vaccanontā viḷakku 1 kum tiruvamitukku māka niroṭaṭṭi lakṣaṇaṅ ceytu kuṭutteṉ Itaṉai rakṣittu
Irukka veṉṟu mahāsabhaiyārkku viṇṇappañ ceyya sabhaiyārum Itukku veṇṭum pramāṇaṅkaḷ kaṇṭu kaṇa
pperumakkaḷai Ipramāṇaṅkaḷai koṇṭu poy rakṣikka Ivvaṇṇam śilālekhaiyum cetuvikka veṉṉa śilāle
khaiyum ceytu sitamāyatuḷ dhammam rakṣippār śrīpādam Enśirassin melatu Itu panmāheśva
rarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
